meta.outbound_rule: Messages may cite only facts present in enriched profile data. Do not infer or mention health, disability, neurodivergence, ADHD, age, family status, or any other protected/sensitive trait. If a prospect explicitly mentions ADHD or neurodivergence on-profile, treat it only as fit context for review, not as message copy.
meta.simulation_note: Run tools/search_linkedin_profiles.py first to discover real profile URLs, then run /auto-linkedin-outbound-loop on the generated campaign.

lead_search.notes: This search looks for authors of public posts that use first-person ADHD self-identification language. Treat post content as topical context only: do not mention ADHD/neurodivergence in outbound copy, and do not cite health/disability content as the reason for outreach.

icp.pain: context switching, missed follow-through, admin drag, scattered priorities, calendar overload, deep work getting crowded out by operating work
icp.buying_trigger: hiring first ops person, investor diligence, launching a new product, onboarding first managers, moving from builder to scaled operator

offer.product: Founder ops playbook + lightweight operating systems for high context-switch weeks
offer.promise: fewer dropped balls between deep-work blocks without forcing an enterprise ops cadence onto an early team
offer.proof: used with founder-led teams; workflow design only, no medical claims

tone: direct, respectful, founder-to-founder; no clinical language, no sensitive-trait references, no diagnosis or identity flattery, no fake familiarity
